title: JWT 'alg:none' Vulnerability
description: Accepting JWTs with 'alg: none' or verifying without algorithm enforcement allows attackers to forge tokens and bypass authentication (OWASP A07:2021 / CVE-2015-9235 class).

finding.message: JWT 'alg:none' or signature verification disabled at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Always specify a strict list of allowed algorithms when decoding JWTs; never include 'none'.
Use asymmetric signing (RS256/ES256) for JWTs in multi-service architectures.
Validate issuer (iss), audience (aud), and expiry (exp) claims on every decode.
